title: Trimble Stock: A Real Asset Software And Data Analytics Powerhouse On Sale
text: TRMB provides the digital backbone for a wide array of real assets. It has a commanding market presence in many of its business segments.

title: Precisional Completes Acquisition of Four Industrial Technology Businesses from Trimble
text: NEW YORK , May 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Precisional , an affiliate of The Jordan Company ("TJC"), announced today that it has completed the previously announced transaction to acquire four industrial technology businesses from Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB). The acquired businesses include Protempis (formerly Trimble Time and Frequency), LOADRITE, Spectra Precision Tools, and SECO.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Outpace Estimates
text: Trimble (TRMB) reports strong first-quarter results, driven by solid momentum across buildings & infrastructure, geospatial, and resources & utilities segments.

title: Trimble Navigation (TRMB) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Trimble (TRMB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.96% and 2.94%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Trimble Announces Record First Quarter 2022 Results
text: Record first quarter total revenue of $994 million, up 12 percent Annualized recurring revenue of $1.47 billion, up 12 percent and 14 percent on an organic basis SUNNYVALE, Calif. , May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ: TRMB) today announced financial results for the first quarter of 2022.
